name: engram
description: Persistent, explainable memory for Codex via the Engram MCP server. BYOK end-to-end — inference is billed by your LLM provider, not us.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent, explainable memory for your agent.
interface.longDescription: Engram is a hosted memory layer for AI agents. The plugin wires Codex into the hosted Engram MCP server so your agent can store_memory, query_memory, list_memories, and more. BYOK end-to-end: inference is billed by your LLM provider, not us.
